name: ship
description: Atomic ship tail for sidecar plugin changes — /ship -m "<msg>" <path>... refreshes the README.md `<!-- LATEST-SHIP -->` marker (if present) with the commit message + UTC date, stages explicit paths (never -A/-u; README.md is auto-staged when the marker was refreshed) → credential-scans the staged diff → commit → push origin/<branch> → sidecar sync (marketplace pull + cache copy + installed_plugins.json patch). The mechanical tail of @D ship / commons g27; the agent owns version bump + surface lockstep + commit message FIRST. NL trigger via skill (ship · 배포 · 출시).
